description.en: Opens the Picture-in-Picture window for the current main browsing context. Returns aPromisethat fulfills with aWindowinstance representing the browsing context inside the Picture-in-Picture window.

excerpt.es: Opens the Picture-in-Picture window for the current main browsing context. Returns aPromisethat fulfills with aWindowinstance representing the browsing context inside the Picture-in-Picture window.
